governed_surfaces.purpose: Rendered-mode adapter that exposes the shared client main-menu surface or a deterministic stub.

Derived rendered viewer shell over map, inspection, sky, water, and orbit artifacts.
Shared menu/navigation model over AppShell command descriptors and LIB manifests.
